item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately refuses the requested new gift handling port, identifies the repeated pattern across exchange, points redemption, presale pickup, and gift pickup, and moves the decision upstream to intake/routing ownership and unified capacity control.
